subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Blessed Beauty! Your faithful letter reached 'Abdu'l-Bahá. Its contents were delightful and its inner meanings were sweet as honey [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی نامه وفا بدست عبدالبهاء رسید مضمون دلنشین بود و معانی شهد و شیرین
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @growth of the Cause
